overall_justification: While the edition mentions aspects that could be interpreted as expansionist (e.g., using the Caixa for conversion and establishing a new monetary unit), the emphasis on accumulating a large "fundo metallisa" for "resgate do papel-moeda," and the concern with maintaining a fixed gold value ("realisar a conversão e estabelecer uma nova unidade monetaria nacional, ouro") strongly suggest an orthodox leaning.  The focus on fiscal discipline and reducing public spending reinforces this interpretation.

supporting_evidence.quote: Nelle se estabelecia o padrão monetario, que havia sido estabelecido pela lei de 1863.
supporting_evidence.reason_for_inclusion: This quote connects the proposed Caixa to the gold standard established in 1863, a key tenet of the Orthodox perspective.

supporting_evidence.quote: Era uma imitação perfeita da nossa Caixa, e quem do typo adoptado. Não se pro-papel-moéda, por meio de impostos, para isso apparelhados.
supporting_evidence.reason_for_inclusion: This suggests a cautious approach to paper money and reinforces the focus on metallic backing, aligning with Orthodox views.

supporting_evidence.quote: Entre nós está montado em uma caixa valor le constituia-se um grande fundo metallisa, que tinha para isso saldos le resgate e de garantia
supporting_evidence.reason_for_inclusion: This emphasizes the importance of a metallic reserve for guaranteeing the value of the currency, a core principle of the Orthodox position.
